theme: mine haul trucks cycling a narrow switchback road
title: Switchback Haul Road: Phase-Locked Convoy Pipeline
strategies: serial baseline: run one truck through complete round trips while the rest of the fleet sits idle at the pit (reproduces the checker's own trivial baseline)
reactive dispatch: every truck advances the instant its next segment and pullout are free and its heat allows it, with no fleet-wide plan (a strong coder's first instinct)

phase-locked convoy: simulate one truck's descent to find the bottleneck segment time and any mandatory cooldown stop, derive a single cadence r from both, and launch the whole fleet as direction-segregated waves spaced exactly r apart
cadence search / local perturbation around the phase-locked wave (fine-tune r and wave boundaries per instance)
